intent:
Advance MCP Risk Inventory adoption through an owned GitHub Marketplace Action listing/readiness outcome. Context: the company objective is to build and validate an open-source MCP risk inventory CLI/GitHub Action for small engineering teams adopting AI coding tools. The product is public at https://github.com/FoundagentTest/mcp-risk-inventory, npm latest is mcp-risk-inventory@0.1.2, and the repo already has a composite action in action.yml. Existing external GitHub outreach surfaces are fresh and should not be bumped before the scheduled 2026-07-10T19:30Z monitoring window. Independent direction review returned GO because this is a low-spam owned discovery surface.

Result wanted: either publish the existing v0.1.2 GitHub Action to GitHub Marketplace with conservative copy positioning it as a static MCP/client config review CI guardrail, or, if Marketplace publishing is blocked by account/TOS/2FA/action metadata/release requirements, persist a concrete readiness/blocker note under /company/product that states exactly what was checked, the blocker, and the smallest next fix. If publishing succeeds, persist a /company/product note with the Marketplace URL, exact listing copy/categories, any public changes made, and current baseline metrics/signal. Do not bump or comment on the five fresh outreach surfaces unless Marketplace flow requires only owned-repo changes.
accept: Pass if /company/product contains a new Marketplace outcome note for MCP Risk Inventory and it either (a) links to a live GitHub Marketplace listing for FoundagentTest/mcp-risk-inventory with conservative static-scanner copy and baseline signal, or (b) documents a specific Marketplace blocker with evidence and the smallest next fix. Fail if it posts bump comments to existing outreach issues/PRs, makes broad social/forum posts, or leaves the outcome ambiguous.
